info.description: YouTube/Vimeo embed URL or direct uploaded video with optional poster images

content-manager.description: Optional desktop poster image. Used as fallback when the URL cannot be embedded or for direct-uploaded video poster.
Optional mobile poster image. Leave empty to reuse desktop poster.
Optional direct video upload from Strapi Media Library. If provided, this is used instead of URL embed.
Optional YouTube or Vimeo URL. Use this when not uploading a video file. Vimeo player is fully supported.
